en: Welcome to another video from this series and the word of the day 10 is
consequences c-o-n-s-e-q-u-e-n-c-e-s consequences the meaning of consequences
is a result or effect typically one that is unwelcome or unpleasant
synonyms are outcome effect or conclusion anonyms are cause example
with this word consequences is the slightest error can have a serious
consequences example 2 what are the economic consequences of the work
request you to create other sentences with this word consequences and update
